PRODUCT DESCRIPTION:

Composition: Poly-Cotton Blend
GSM: 175
Country of production: Pakistan

 

Care Guide: Machine wash up to 30C, Gentle Cycle.  Only Non-chlorine bleach if needed. Wash with similar colors only. Dry in a dryer (recommended) & do not Iron Directly on Print. Do not scrub, do not twist.

products.title: Core Tees | Essential Slate Blue
products.body_html:
The Slate Blue CORE Tee hits that perfect balance — calm, clean, and completely wearable. Crafted using GROOVY’s signature 220 GSM 100% cotton, this heavyweight blank brings structure, softness, and serious fit energy.

  • Custom oversized silhouette with drop shoulders

  • Dyed in a cool slate blue shade, unique yet versatile

  • Built to be worn on repeat — layered or solo

From street shots to off-duty fits, this is your understated essential that still stands out. A blank tee that speaks without saying too much — and does more than most.

One of GROOVY’s most refined core shades to date.

Available In 6 different colors & bundles of 2,3,4. 

Proudly produced in Pakistan. 

Colors may vary due to screen settings, please expect a +/- 10% difference In actual product look. Need help with sizing? Reach out to us on our socials.

products.title: White Cuban Shirt
products.body_html:
The White Cuban Shirt — Fresh, Minimal, Timeless.


Meet GROOVY’s White Cuban Shirt, designed to beat the heat while keeping your fit sharp. With its breezy silhouette, premium fabric, and signature Cuban collar — this is streetwear simplicity done right. The minimal GROOVY logo print adds just the right touch, making it versatile enough to dress up or down.

Crisp, lightweight, and endlessly wearable — this is your blank canvas for the season. Whether you're pairing it with cargos or layering it open with a tee, this shirt levels up your everyday style.

Searching for oversized white Cuban shirts in Pakistan or minimal summer wear for men? This piece nails both.

Proudly produced In Pakistan. 

Colors may vary due to screen settings; please expect a +/- 10% difference In actual product look. Need help with sizing? Reach out to us on our socials.

products.title: Black Cuban Shirt
products.body_html:
Clean, Cool, Timeless — GROOVY's Black Cuban Shirt
Elevate your streetwear essentials with GROOVY’s all-new Black Cuban Shirt — a modern classic designed for those who value minimalism with impact. Made for Pakistan’s evolving fashion scene, this relaxed-fit shirt features a sharp Cuban collar, breathable fabric, and a clean silhouette that effortlessly drapes for a crisp look.

A subtle GROOVY staple logo sits proudly on the chest — keeping things bold, but never loud. Whether layered or styled solo, this shirt is the perfect crossover between casual and premium.

Looking for minimal black Cuban shirts in Pakistan or oversized men’s summer shirts? This is your go-to piece for clean fits, day or night.

Proudly produced In Pakistan.

products.title: Fade Washed Blank
products.body_html:
Introducing Pakistan’s first-ever fade washed t-shirt, designed exclusively for the local streetwear scene. This oversized t-shirt for men and women in Pakistan features a unique wash that starts in muted grey tones at the shoulders and gradually blends into a rich black finish—creating a visually striking gradient fade. Crafted for comfort and statement styling, the baggy t-shirt is made for those who appreciate minimalism with an edge. With its drop shoulder cut, unisex fit, and premium cotton build, this loose fit t-shirt delivers effortless street style.

Perfect for layering or standalone wear, it’s a standout piece for those seeking oversized tees online in Pakistan. Available now at GROOVY Pakistan – set the trend before it spreads.

Proudly produced In Pakistan. 

Colors may vary due to screen settings; please expect a +/- 10% difference In actual product look. Need help with sizing? Reach out to us on our socials.
